commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore, you son of man, prepare you belongings for moving, and move by day in their sight; and you shall move from your place to another place in their sight: it may be they will consider, though they are a rebellious house. Literally, "vessels of transmigration "(Haydock) or bundles, (Calmet) and what was requisite for travelling, (Worthington) or in exile. (Haydock) All this, to chap. , happened five years before the fall of Jerusalem. (Calmet) See chap.
